markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on SEO content strategy, governance, and workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/oh2D64dymWEQqfTfqE_6epDE4UCWnrfQ?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strategy Shift:** Focus is now on email security, misdirected email prevention, and the new AI Phishing Coach, while pausing Threat Intel content.](https://fathom.video/share/oh2D64dymWEQqfTfqE_6epDE4UCWnrfQ?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
  - [**Content Refresh First:** Prioritize refreshing existing content (especially 16 articles ranking 11-20) over creating new articles to capture traffic from aged URLs.](https://fathom.video/share/oh2D64dymWEQqfTfqE_6epDE4UCWnrfQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2141.0)
  - [**Quality at Scale:** The goal is high-quality content at a high volume (targeting \~15-20/week) to hit aggressive traffic goals, balancing brand alignment with SEO performance.](https://fathom.video/share/oh2D64dymWEQqfTfqE_6epDE4UCWnrfQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1572.0)
  - [**New Workflow:** GrowthX will import Abnormal's disabled URL list to their Content OS, with Emily as the primary approver for new topics and Abdallah approving webinar repurposing.](https://fathom.video/share/oh2D64dymWEQqfTfqE_6epDE4UCWnrfQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2678.0)

## Topics

### Content Governance & CMS Audit

  - [Abnormal disabled a list of URLs for a CMS audit to improve brand alignment and user experience.](https://fathom.video/share/oh2D64dymWEQqfTfqE_6epDE4UCWnrfQ?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [**Disabled Content Categories & Actions:**](https://fathom.video/share/oh2D64dymWEQqfTfqE_6epDE4UCWnrfQ?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)
      - [**Permanent Disable (Red):** Content too far outside Abnormal's core business.](https://fathom.video/share/oh2D64dymWEQqfTfqE_6epDE4UCWnrfQ?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)
      - [**Review & Tweak:**](https://fathom.video/share/oh2D64dymWEQqfTfqE_6epDE4UCWnrfQ?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
          - [**Platform Capabilities:** Verify product messaging with PMM.](https://fathom.video/share/oh2D64dymWEQqfTfqE_6epDE4UCWnrfQ?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
          - [**Threat Intel:** Ensure content aligns with Abnormal's capabilities (review with Head of Threat Intel).](https://fathom.video/share/oh2D64dymWEQqfTfqE_6epDE4UCWnrfQ?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0)
          - [**Insider Threats:** Remove sections not tied to misdirected email prevention.](https://fathom.video/share/oh2D64dymWEQqfTfqE_6epDE4UCWnrfQ?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
      - [**Re-enable:** Content that needs minor tweaks.](https://fathom.video/share/oh2D64dymWEQqfTfqE_6epDE4UCWnrfQ?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [**Workflow:** GrowthX will import the list to Content OS. Mariana will highlight specific sections for Abnormal's review in Google Docs, simplifying the approval process.](https://fathom.video/share/oh2D64dymWEQqfTfqE_6epDE4UCWnrfQ?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)

### New Content Strategy & Messaging

  - [**Primary Focus:**](https://fathom.video/share/oh2D64dymWEQqfTfqE_6epDE4UCWnrfQ?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
      - [**Email Security:** Stake a claim as the leading provider.](https://fathom.video/share/oh2D64dymWEQqfTfqE_6epDE4UCWnrfQ?tab=summary&timestamp=777.0)
      - [**Misdirected Email Prevention:** Leverage the new product launch.](https://fathom.video/share/oh2D64dymWEQqfTfqE_6epDE4UCWnrfQ?tab=summary&timestamp=759.0)
      - [**AI Phishing Coach:** Build traction for this new offering.](https://fathom.video/share/oh2D64dymWEQqfTfqE_6epDE4UCWnrfQ?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)
  - [**Messaging Nuance (per Gartner MQ):**](https://fathom.video/share/oh2D64dymWEQqfTfqE_6epDE4UCWnrfQ?tab=summary&timestamp=916.0)
      - [**Legacy SEGs:** Frame traditional, signature-based Secure Email Gateways (SEGs) as inadequate on their own.](https://fathom.video/share/oh2D64dymWEQqfTfqE_6epDE4UCWnrfQ?tab=summary&timestamp=916.0)
      - [**Abnormal's Role:** Position Abnormal's behavioral AI as the necessary complement to a built-in Microsoft/Google SEG, not as a replacement for the SEG itself.](https://fathom.video/share/oh2D64dymWEQqfTfqE_6epDE4UCWnrfQ?tab=summary&timestamp=916.0)

### Website Redesign & Content Migration

  - [**Context:** A full website redesign and replatforming is underway.](https://fathom.video/share/oh2D64dymWEQqfTfqE_6epDE4UCWnrfQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1158.0)
  - [**Timeline:** MVP launch is mid-to-late February. Content migration (blog, resources, glossary) begins in January.](https://fathom.video/share/oh2D64dymWEQqfTfqE_6epDE4UCWnrfQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1386.0)
  - [**Content Pruning:** The migration will be selective to improve user journeys and focus on high-quality content.](https://fathom.video/share/oh2D64dymWEQqfTfqE_6epDE4UCWnrfQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1158.0)
  - [**Redirect Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/oh2D64dymWEQqfTfqE_6epDE4UCWnrfQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1279.0)
      - [**Preference:** Use 404s for low-performing content.](https://fathom.video/share/oh2D64dymWEQqfTfqE_6epDE4UCWnrfQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1279.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This avoids redirect chains and allows for a custom 404 page that guides users to relevant content, improving UX.](https://fathom.video/share/oh2D64dymWEQqfTfqE_6epDE4UCWnrfQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1310.0)

### Content Volume & Performance Goals

  - [**Tension:** Balancing content quality with the volume needed to hit aggressive traffic goals.](https://fathom.video/share/oh2D64dymWEQqfTfqE_6epDE4UCWnrfQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1572.0)
  - [**Abnormal's Goal:** Hit aggressive monthly visit targets for the current quarter, which were missed last quarter.](https://fathom.video/share/oh2D64dymWEQqfTfqE_6epDE4UCWnrfQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1572.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Role:** Deliver high-quality content at scale, targeting \~15-20 articles/week.](https://fathom.video/share/oh2D64dymWEQqfTfqE_6epDE4UCWnrfQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1572.0)
  - [**Abdallah's Rationale:** A high-volume, AI-driven workflow is required to hit targets. A low-volume approach would negate the value of the AI investment.](https://fathom.video/share/oh2D64dymWEQqfTfqE_6epDE4UCWnrfQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1637.0)

### Content Pipeline & Approvals

  - [**Threat Intel Content:** Paused. Callie will define a new workflow for GrowthX support once her role focuses exclusively on Threat Intel.](https://fathom.video/share/oh2D64dymWEQqfTfqE_6epDE4UCWnrfQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1998.0)
  - [**Content Refresh Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/oh2D64dymWEQqfTfqE_6epDE4UCWnrfQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2100.0)
      - [**Priority 1 (Low-Hanging Fruit):** 16 articles ranking 11-20.](https://fathom.video/share/oh2D64dymWEQqfTfqE_6epDE4UCWnrfQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2400.0)
      - [**Priority 2 (Rewrites):** 17 articles with no traction but high relevancy.](https://fathom.video/share/oh2D64dymWEQqfTfqE_6epDE4UCWnrfQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2400.0)
      - [**Priority 3 (Rewrites):** 135 articles with no traction.](https://fathom.video/share/oh2D64dymWEQqfTfqE_6epDE4UCWnrfQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2400.0)
  - [**Approval Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/oh2D64dymWEQqfTfqE_6epDE4UCWnrfQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2678.0)
      - [**New Topics:** Emily is the primary approver.](https://fathom.video/share/oh2D64dymWEQqfTfqE_6epDE4UCWnrfQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2710.0)
      - [**Webinar Repurposing:** Abdallah can approve directly.](https://fathom.video/share/oh2D64dymWEQqfTfqE_6epDE4UCWnrfQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2984.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Callie:**](https://fathom.video/share/oh2D64dymWEQqfTfqE_6epDE4UCWnrfQ?tab=summary&timestamp=883.0)
      - [Share internal docs for misdirected email prevention and AI Phishing Coach.](https://fathom.video/share/oh2D64dymWEQqfTfqE_6epDE4UCWnrfQ?tab=summary&timestamp=883.0)
      - [Define a Threat Intel content workflow for GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/oh2D64dymWEQqfTfqE_6epDE4UCWnrfQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1998.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/oh2D64dymWEQqfTfqE_6epDE4UCWnrfQ?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)
      - [Import the disabled URL list to Content OS.](https://fathom.video/share/oh2D64dymWEQqfTfqE_6epDE4UCWnrfQ?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)
      - [Audit the entire blog for more refresh opportunities (pages ranking 11-20).](https://fathom.video/share/oh2D64dymWEQqfTfqE_6epDE4UCWnrfQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2249.0)
      - [Request new topic approvals from Emily via Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/oh2D64dymWEQqfTfqE_6epDE4UCWnrfQ?tab=summary&timestamp=3028.0)
  - [**All:**](https://fathom.video/share/oh2D64dymWEQqfTfqE_6epDE4UCWnrfQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2872.0)
      - [Maintain open communication on pace and performance to ensure goals are met.](https://fathom.video/share/oh2D64dymWEQqfTfqE_6epDE4UCWnrfQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2872.0)
